bad_result_policy: If later rejected, do not create/suggest refinement, direct inversion, continuation, or extension of AR-009/AR-028; at most one genuinely divergent idea should remain.
evaluation_type: Alpaca real daily OHLCV direct harness plus qfa integration smoke
hypothesis: Abnormal closing-auction-like volume pressure predicts next-day reversal/liquidity provision.

proxy_limitation.proxy: abnormal full-day volume and dollar volume plus close location near daily high/low and same-direction return pressure

divergent.hypothesis: Use liquid sector/index ETFs and minute-bar last-30-minute range/volume dislocation to test liquidity reversal where actual closing-period volume is observable, distinct from mega-cap daily volume-price pressure.
divergent.title: Intraday ETF closing-dislocation liquidity basket

refinement.hypothesis: For watchlist promotion, sweep volume/close-location thresholds and add market-regime/liquidity-spread filters to test whether abnormal end-of-day liquidity reversal remains positive after 5 bps costs without overfitting.
refinement.title: Closing-volume reversal robustness and execution filters

warnings: No trades placed; qfa daemon not run.
Alpaca daily bars do not provide true closing-auction volume or imbalance.
qfa CLI has no native cost parameter; 5 bps costs are applied in direct harness.
Temporary SQLite DB path under /tmp should be removed after evaluation.
